title: Touhou little maid RPG Task
body:
This mod does not overide or substitute anything from touhou little maid mod, it just adds new tasks wich act as RPG themed roles

resumed description : 

# Maid RPG Task

# Features

## Tank

protect allies and have damage taken down, bigger health, can stun and provoke, have low damage and attack speed

## DPS

Damage dealer have big attack and faster attack speed, run faster, if equip sword in second hand deal bigger damage, have low health

## Support

Support allies with buffs while debuffing enemy and revive player, support need XP level to use buffs and xp is spent over time, cannot attack

## Master

All in one the Master Maid have the damage and attack speed of DPS, the health, defence, stun and provoke of tank and buff, debuff, revive player from support with no donwisdes, since it's too OP it is disabled as default in config. Master is disabled as default in configs and can be enabled.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/5nrJntLyMuQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


Detailed Description : 

i plan to add more things in the future, i added 4 new tasks with interesting skills based on RPG classes style more informations on the tasks added and skills below : 



DPS or Damage dealer - is a combat task that will make maid have increased damage, increased attack speed but very low health, like a glass cannon

• A maid using two swords in each hand looks cool but now is functional if maid is using a weapon in secondary hand she will deal bigger damage

 • Maid will switch between ranged and meele weapons based on target distance, works for bows, crossbows and gohei too, have compatibility with modded bows and crossbow i believe, maid need to have these weapons inside her inventory to be able to switch.

i plan to add interesting mechanics for this task in the future like baubles to decide a subclass example : berserk, rogue, magical knight



Support - is a support role task and maid using this task will give effects like strength and resistance to allies when the battle start, by battle start i mean when pets or player are being targeted, she will also revive bleeding players, as an extra if player takes lethal damage ( a damage that would normally kill the player) putting a totem on her bauble inventory will make the maid use the totem to save player from death and work as a normal totem does. The maid with this task will also give weakness effect to targets and she CANNOT attack but give support for allies



(support need XP Level 0+ to cast positive effects and she Will spend XP overtime)



Tank - is a defensive role task, maid will have very low damage, low attack speed but high health and damage taken down, the maid with tank task will also transfer the damage allies receive when they get hit to herself , and allies will be damaged by just 50%, if maid is using a shield in the secondary hand she will be able to use a skill that will stun enemies (Stun = enemies will be unable to move properly and will have decreased damage for a few seconds) maid will also provoke enemies to make them target her, the provoke skill works with most of vanilla and modded entities.



Every task has it's weak points and strong points but together they will fill each other.

i recommend using modpacks that makes the game harder to use this addon and rely on your maids more.

secret hidden class :

Master Maid - Master Maid will have the best of each class, strength and attack speed of dps, ability to have increased damage if sword in secondary hand, switch between ranged and meele weapons based on target distance have the health and damage taken down of tank and it's habilities, transfer damage to protect allies, stun, provoke, give buffs while debuffing the enemy then reviving the player

for this mod to work properly you will need Touhou Little Maid mod : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/touhou-little-maid



And Player revive mod is optional but you will need that mod for revive behavior : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/playerrevive


I plan to update and add more things for this addon in the future like mage class that will use a gohei with elemental magic, and a soul spell that can get 3 maids at once and "teleport" them to you anywhere you are in the game even through dimensions.
